"D:\Program Files\Microsoft Visual Studio\2022\Community\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\ProgrammingLab.dir/objects.a
"D:\Program Files\mingw64\bin\ar.exe" qc CMakeFiles\ProgrammingLab.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\ProgrammingLab.dir\objects1.rsp
"D:\Program Files\mingw64\bin\g++.exe" -g  -mwindows -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\ProgrammingLab.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o ProgrammingLab.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libProgrammingLab.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\ProgrammingLab.dir\linkLibs.rsp
